zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice le Rus於1245年12月25日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德時，她的父親William le Rus25歲，母親Agatha de Clere22歲。她於1260年9月9日與Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年1月28日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年55歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice le Rus于1245年12月25日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德时，她的父亲William le Rus25岁，母亲Agatha de Clere22岁。她于1260年9月9日与Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年1月28日在英国英格兰諾福爾可享年55岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Rus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Rusu
meanings: Romanian: ethnic name, in a definite articulated variant, from rus ‘Russian’ (see Rus 1).

variants.name: Ros
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.
Swedish: ornamental name from ros ‘rose’.

variants.name: Rusek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Casimir, Janusz, Jozef, Leszek, Wojciech.
Polish and Czech: ethnic name from a diminutive of   Rus   ‘Russian’.
Czech: descriptive nickname from an agent noun based on the adjective rusý ‘strawberry blond’.

variants.name: Orosz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Imre, Miklos, Tibor, Akos, Andras, Arpad, Csaba, Csilla, Gabor, Lajos.
Hungarian: ethnic name for a Russian, orosz in Hungarian. See Rus , compare Oros .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice le Rus was born on 25 December 1245, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William le Rus, was 25 and her mother, Agatha de Clere, was 22. She married Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor on 9 September 1260, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 January 1301, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice le Rus est née le 25 décembre 1245, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William le Rus, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Clere, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor le 9 septembre 1260, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1301, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice le Rus am 25. Dezember 1245 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William le Rus 25 und ihre Mutter Agatha de Clere 22. Sie hat am 9. September 1260 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Januar 1301 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice le Rus è nata il il 25 dicembre 1245 nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William le Rus, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agatha de Clere, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor il 9 settembre 1260, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 gennaio 1301, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice le Rusが1245年12月25日にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで生まれた時，父William le Rusは25歳，母Agatha de Clereは22歳であった。1260年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでRichard de Braose Lord Stinton Manorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年1月28日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで55歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice le Rus(이)가 1245년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William le Rus(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Clere(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1260년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 1월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.25 December 1245–28 January 1301: 25 de dezembro de 1245–28 de janeiro de 1301
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice le Rus nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1245, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William le Rus, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Clere, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor em 9 de setembro de 1260, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1301, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice le Rus родилась 25 декабря 1245 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William le Rus было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Clere, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor 9 сентября 1260 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 января 1301 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия.

es.25 December 1245–28 January 1301: 25 de diciembre de 1245–28 de enero de 1301
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice le Rus nació el 25 de diciembre de 1245, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William le Rus, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agatha de Clere, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor el 9 de septiembre de 1260, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de enero de 1301, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
